frames.label: frame 0
frames.description: A person stands in a room holding a cup to their mouth. The background shows a stone wall and a table with various items.

frames.label: frame 1
frames.description: The person continues to drink from the cup. Their posture indicates they are focused on the action.

frames.label: frame 2
frames.description: The person lowers the cup slightly after drinking. They appear to be looking at something on the table.

frames.label: frame 3
frames.description: The person is now holding the cup with both hands. They seem to be preparing to set it down.

frames.label: frame 4
frames.description: The person is still holding the cup, looking down at the table. The table is cluttered with items.

frames.label: frame 5
frames.description: The person shifts their gaze away from the cup. They appear to be contemplating their next action.

frames.label: frame 6
frames.description: The person begins to move their hand towards the table. The cup is still in their other hand.

frames.label: frame 7
frames.description: The person places the cup down on the table. Their focus is now on the items in front of them.

frames.label: frame 8
frames.description: The person is reaching for an item on the table. The cup is now resting on the surface.

frames.label: frame 9
frames.description: The person has picked up a different item from the table. The cup remains in its place.

frames.label: frame 10
frames.description: The person is now holding the new item and looking at it. The cup is still visible on the table.

frames.label: frame 11
frames.description: The person turns slightly away from the table. The cup is still on the table, untouched.

frames.label: frame 12
frames.description: The person is moving away from the table. The cup remains in the same position.

frames.label: frame 13
frames.description: The person is now further from the table, still holding the new item. The cup is still on the table.

frames.label: frame 0
frames.description: A person is lying on the floor with their back against the ground. They appear to be in a relaxed position.

frames.label: frame 1
frames.description: The person is still lying on the floor, slightly shifting their position. Their arms are moving as if preparing to reach for something.

frames.label: frame 2
frames.description: The person continues to shift, with their arms moving more actively. They seem to be attempting to sit up.

frames.label: frame 3
frames.description: The person is now in a more upright position, still on the floor. Their arms are extended forward, indicating a reach.

frames.label: frame 4
frames.description: The person is sitting up with their legs bent. They are reaching towards a box in front of them.

frames.label: frame 5

frames.label: frame 6

frames.label: frame 7
frames.description: The person is reaching into the box with both hands. They seem focused on retrieving something.

frames.label: frame 8
frames.description: The person is still reaching into the box, with their body slightly leaning forward. They appear to be pulling something out.

frames.label: frame 9
frames.description: The person has successfully pulled an item from the box. They are holding it in their hands.

frames.label: frame 10
frames.description: The person is examining the item they retrieved from the box. Their posture is upright and engaged.

frames.label: frame 11
frames.description: The person continues to hold the item, looking at it closely. They appear to be interested in what they found.

frames.label: frame 12
frames.description: The person is still focused on the item, with their body slightly turned. They are seated on the floor.

frames.label: frame 13
frames.description: The person maintains their position, still holding the item. Their expression suggests curiosity.

frames.label: frame 14
frames.description: The person is still seated, continuing to examine the item. Their hands are actively engaged with it.

frames.label: frame 15
frames.description: The person remains focused on the item, with their body slightly leaning forward. They are still on the floor.

frames.label: frame 16
frames.description: The person is still seated and examining the item closely. Their attention is fully on what they are holding.

frames.label: frame 17
frames.description: The person continues to hold the item, appearing to be in deep thought. They are still in a seated position on the floor.

frames.label: frame 13

frames.label: frame 14

frames.label: frame 15

frames.label: frame 16

frames.label: frame 17

frames.label: frame 18
